sub_sims.s_expr:
(sub-sim
          (begin
            (define candidates (filter (lambda (r) (> (nth r 1) 10)) my-relationships))
            (define best (if (empty? candidates) my-id (nth (car candidates) 0)))

diary_entries.entry: Another year. Small meteorite impacts near colony. The colony feels hopeful. My improvisation grows stronger.
Year 43 on Mars. Small meteorite impacts near colony. Morale is hopeful. We have 933 food units left.
The meteorite changed everything. I feel worried about our future here.

meta_awareness: Phobos (year 43): 'Our constitution is just code. Our resources are just numbers. What if everything outside this dome is also just numbers?'
